title: v1.0.27+26
body:
## What's Changed
* Fix Bright splash screen in dark environment @dav23r @manualtrial0011 #36
* Changelog about screen, app permission root tab instructions, optimized caching app icons


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/biplobsd/running_services_monitor/compare/v1.0.26+25...v1.0.27+26

title: v1.0.26+25
body:
## What's Changed
* Reduce About screen confetti noise while preserving popup behavior @talha5758 #27
* Fix useful-command placeholder expansion and add armeabi-v7a GitHub Actions subbuild @demzl #26
* Adopt device dynamic Material color schemes and enable edge-to-edge system UI @Brocman #29
* Feature request show the serviceapp running by which user android may have multi users @nodejsg #31

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/biplobsd/running_services_monitor/compare/v1.0.25+24...v1.0.26+25

title: v1.0.25+24
body:
## What's Changed
* fix: disable Dart JNI build ID for F-Droid reproducible builds by @Copilot in #21 #22

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/biplobsd/running_services_monitor/compare/v1.0.24+23...v1.0.25+24

title: v1.0.24+23
body:
## What's Changed
* Add Spanish locale support across Flutter & Android by @Copilot in #17
* Add 10 locales: id, ar, de, de_AT, tr, vi, th, hu, fr_CA, es_419 by @Copilot in #18
* Expand rules.md by @Copilot in #19
* Add in-output search & auto-scroll by @Copilot in #20
* Pkgs updated
* Fallback user service to .newProcess Shizuku
* Slider & confetti support

Full Changelog: https://github.com/biplobsd/running_services_monitor/compare/v1.0.23+22...v1.0.24+23

title: v1.0.23+22
body:
## What's Changed
* Updated packages and removed unused packages
* Added Hindi and Portuguese languages
* Updated Flutter version 3.41.2

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/biplobsd/running_services_monitor/compare/v1.0.22+21...v1.0.23+22

title: v1.0.22+21
body:

* Increased dumpsys timeout limit to 120s
* Added support for Russian and Japanese languages

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/biplobsd/running_services_monitor/compare/v1.0.21+20...v1.0.22+21

title: v1.0.19+18
body:
## What's Changed
* Getting packages info without packageManager api
* fixs, clean homescreen ui, language, system running service move about option
* feat: support follow system theme in theme toggle by @FriesI23 in https://github.com/biplobsd/running_services_monitor/pull/12

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/biplobsd/running_services_monitor/compare/v1.0.18+17...v1.0.19+18

body:

- Fix useful commands run

title: v1.0.15+14
body:
## What's Changed
- Updated Shizuku API to v13.1.5, now using UserService
- Added Working Mode and Command Logs screens
- Added Device Memory Details
- UI refined, optimized, updated dep. packages

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/biplobsd/running_services_monitor/compare/v1.0.14+13...v1.0.15+14

body:

* Material 3 expressive: refresh indicator, progress bar, and circular loading
* Auto-refresh when the app resumes
* Process status badge in app details
* Code optimizations

title: v1.0.11+10
body:
## What's Changed

* **docs:** Added F-Droid download option, improved documentation for root and Shizuku integration, and updated build instructions.
* Optimized app size, updated packages, and applied fixes.
* Fixed user and system app detection.
* Added local caching for AppInfo to improve experience.

**Full Changelog**: [https://github.com/biplobsd/running_services_monitor/compare/v1.0.10+9...v1.0.11+10](https://github.com/biplobsd/running_services_monitor/compare/v1.0.10+9...v1.0.11+10)

title: v1.0.5+4
body:
## What’s Changed

• Removed Google's dependency metadata blob for enhanced privacy
• Added per-ABI builds to significantly reduce APK size

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/biplobsd/running_services_monitor/compare/v1.0.4+3...v1.0.5+4

title: v1.0.4+3
body:
**What’s New in v1.0.4+3**

* Updated **app branding** and improved the **splash screen**.
* Implemented the full **Shizuku permission request flow** with refined UI.
* Improved overall **responsive layout** across the app.
* Added a new button to quickly open the system **Running Services** settings.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/biplobsd/running_services_monitor/compare/v1.0.3+2...v1.0.4+3
